topic: Conjunctions (And, But, Or, So, Because, Although, While)

drills.title: Conjunctions (And, But, Or, So, Because, Although, While) — Speaking Set 1

sentences.english: I drink both tea and coffee.
sentences.hindi: मैं चाय और कॉफी दोनों पीता हूँ।
sentences.pronunciation: i drink both tea and coffee

sentences.english: I was tired, but I finished the work.
sentences.hindi: मैं थका हुआ था, लेकिन मैंने काम पूरा किया।
sentences.pronunciation: i was tired but i finished the work

sentences.english: Would you like tea or coffee?
sentences.hindi: क्या तुम चाय या कॉफी पीना चाहोगे?
sentences.pronunciation: would you like tea or coffee

drills.title: Conjunctions (And, But, Or, So, Because, Although, While) — Speaking Set 2

sentences.english: I was late, so I left quickly.
sentences.hindi: मुझे देर हो गई, इसलिए मैं जल्दी निकला।
sentences.pronunciation: i was late so i left quickly

sentences.english: I came late because there was traffic.
sentences.hindi: मैं देर से आया क्योंकि ट्रैफिक था।
sentences.pronunciation: i came late because there was traffic

sentences.english: Although he was tired, he kept working.
sentences.hindi: हालांकि वह थका हुआ था, वह काम करता रहा।
sentences.pronunciation: although he was tired he kept working

drills.title: Conjunctions (And, But, Or, So, Because, Although, While) — Speaking Set 3

sentences.english: I was cooking while she was studying.
sentences.hindi: मैं खाना बना रहा था जबकि वह पढ़ रही थी।
sentences.pronunciation: i was cooking while she was studying

sentences.english: She is smart and hardworking.
sentences.hindi: वह smart और मेहनती है।
sentences.pronunciation: she is smart and hardworking

sentences.english: I like this, but it is expensive.
sentences.hindi: मुझे यह पसंद है, लेकिन यह महंगा है।
sentences.pronunciation: i like this but it is expensive

drills.title: Conjunctions (And, But, Or, So, Because, Although, While) — Speaking Set 4

sentences.english: You can go now or later.
sentences.hindi: तुम अभी जा सकते हो या बाद में।
sentences.pronunciation: you can go now or later

sentences.english: It was raining, so we stayed inside.
sentences.hindi: बारिश हो रही थी, इसलिए हम अंदर रुके।
sentences.pronunciation: it was raining so we stayed inside

sentences.english: He succeeded because he worked hard.
sentences.hindi: वह सफल हुआ क्योंकि उसने मेहनत की।
sentences.pronunciation: he succeeded because he worked hard

drills.title: Conjunctions (And, But, Or, So, Because, Although, While) — Speaking Set 5

sentences.english: Although the weather was bad, we traveled.
sentences.hindi: हालांकि मौसम खराब था, हमने यात्रा की।
sentences.pronunciation: although the weather was bad we traveled

sentences.english: I was studying while he was sleeping.
sentences.hindi: मैं पढ़ रहा था जबकि वह सो रहा था।
sentences.pronunciation: i was studying while he was sleeping

sentences.english: We were happy and excited.
sentences.hindi: हम खुश और उत्साहित थे।
sentences.pronunciation: we were happy and excited

drills.title: Conjunctions (And, But, Or, So, Because, Although, While) — Speaking Set 6

sentences.english: This is good, but it can be improved.
sentences.hindi: यह अच्छा है, लेकिन इसे बेहतर बनाया जा सकता है।
sentences.pronunciation: this is good but it can be improved

sentences.english: We can watch a movie or stay at home.
sentences.hindi: हम फिल्म देख सकते हैं या घर पर रह सकते हैं।
sentences.pronunciation: we can watch a movie or stay at home

sentences.english: I was hungry, so I ate food.
sentences.hindi: मुझे भूख लगी थी, इसलिए मैंने खाना खाया।
sentences.pronunciation: i was hungry so i ate food

drills.title: Conjunctions (And, But, Or, So, Because, Although, While) — Speaking Set 7

sentences.english: She cried because she was sad.
sentences.hindi: वह रोई क्योंकि वह दुखी थी।
sentences.pronunciation: she cried because she was sad

sentences.english: Although it was difficult, we tried.
sentences.hindi: हालांकि यह मुश्किल था, हमने कोशिश की।
sentences.pronunciation: although it was difficult we tried
